description: You are a software engineer at a SaaS company. The shared calendar service recently deployed an update that broke several scheduling features. Users are reporting recurring meetings appearing on wrong days, events shifting by an hour after daylight saving time (DST) transitions, all-day events spanning extra days, conference rooms getting double-booked, and exported .ics files being rejected by Outlook. Fix the scheduling engine located at /home/ga/workspace/calendar_engine/ so that all tests in the tests/ directory pass.
